name: Fleet Technician Onboarding
description: Complete onboarding process for new fleet technician

steps.title: Verify Required Documentation
steps.description: Ensure all required documents are provided and valid

substeps.title: Verify driver's license
substeps.description: Check license validity, class, and expiration date

substeps.title: Review Motor Vehicle Record (MVR)
substeps.description: Assess driving history for any violations or restrictions

substeps.title: Confirm insurance documentation
substeps.description: Review proof of insurance and coverage limits

substeps.title: Verify background check completion
substeps.description: Confirm background check results are satisfactory

steps.title: Set Up System Access
steps.description: Create accounts and configure system access

substeps.title: Create Enterprise ID
substeps.description: Generate unique Enterprise ID for technician

substeps.title: Configure fleet management system access
substeps.description: Grant appropriate permissions in fleet tracking system

substeps.title: Assign mobile device and apps
substeps.description: Provide tablet/phone with required fleet management apps

substeps.title: Configure GPS tracking permissions
substeps.description: Set up vehicle and technician location tracking

steps.title: Complete Required Training
steps.description: Ensure technician completes all mandatory training

substeps.title: Complete vehicle safety training
substeps.description: Verify completion of commercial vehicle safety course

substeps.title: Review fleet policies and procedures
substeps.description: Confirm understanding of fleet management policies

substeps.title: Emergency response training
substeps.description: Complete training on emergency procedures and contacts

substeps.title: Update HR system with fleet information
substeps.description: Ensure HR records reflect fleet assignment status

substeps.title: Notify fleet management of new technician
substeps.description: Send notification to fleet supervisors and managers

substeps.title: Schedule initial vehicle assignment
substeps.description: Prepare for first vehicle assignment process
